title: No 32768 Limit
description: This mod that removes the 32768 block limit of the /fill and /clone commands
body:
- Take inspiration from command-o-matic and remove the annoying /fill and /clone limit of 32,768 blocks in Minecraft and replace it with 2147483647 blocks (almost unlimited)
- In version 1.19.3, the 32,768 block limit for /fillbiome instructions was removed.
